productDisplayName: Fila Men Pursuit Black Sports Shoes
description: Style noteCrafted from Italy's materials capital Biella, this fila shoe promises a smooth ride and optimal durability. fila fanboys know the comfort that this brand provides - do you need more reasons to buy the DLS Pursuit. Product DetailsRound toed black and red shoe with central lace-ups and shiny synthetic overlaysHeavily padded mesh inner, tongue and collarFoamy rubber midsole upraised at the heel and curved at the midfootAggressive TPU outsole with flex grooves, patterned lugs and a decoupled heelMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
